name: Diva Catering
seoDescription: Diva Catering is the Santa Rosa catering company behind Muffin Street Baking Company — gold-medal breakfast, lunch, and light-refreshment catering for Sonoma County business meetings and events, with scratch-baked muffins, in-house roasted turkey, and fresh seasonal salads.

contact.address: Hwy 12 & Mission Blvd, Santa Rosa, CA 95409

sections.eyebrow: Santa Rosa, CA · Catering by Muffin Street Baking Co.
sections.heading: Business catering, done the way you'd do it yourself
sections.subheading: From early-morning meetings to last-minute lunches, Diva Catering brings gold-medal, scratch-baked food to Sonoma County offices and events — breakfast, lunch, and light refreshments, large groups or small.
badges: Gold medals — Sonoma County Harvest Fair

sections.heading: Catering built for the working day
sections.intro: Diva Catering grew out of Muffin Street Baking Company, so every tray starts in a real scratch bakery — then gets delivered, set up, and out of your way.

items.title: Bakery-fresh, from scratch
items.body: Muffins, scones, pastries, salads, and sandwiches made in-house with fresh, local ingredients — not pulled off a truck.

items.title: Early or last-minute
items.body: Built for business: 6:30 AM meeting spreads or a same-day lunch. Rush orders welcome with short notice.

items.title: Delivered & set up
items.body: Delivery across Santa Rosa, with plates, napkins, and serving utensils available so you can keep the meeting moving.

sections.heading: Breakfast, lunch & sweets
sections.intro: A la carte trays sized for small parties of six to large groups of twenty — mix and match to fit the room.

items.title: Breakfast Spreads
items.description: Trays of assorted fresh-baked muffins, scones, pastries, and coffeecake; bagels with cream cheese; homemade frittata and quiche; fresh seasonal fruit; and Joe-To-Go service featuring organic, locally roasted Ecco Caffè coffee.

items.title: Lunch Catering
items.description: Assorted sandwich trays featuring in-house roasted turkey, turkey-pesto and vegetarian wraps, savory vegetable tarts, and homemade soup of the day — plus boxed lunches for grab-and-go meetings.

items.title: Fresh-Made Salads
items.description: Hearty Mediterranean, Sonoma (romaine, blue cheese, caramelized walnuts, green apple, poppyseed), and classic Caesar — made to order and sized for the group.

items.title: Hot Lunch Items
items.description: Cheese tortellini in creamy pesto, baked penne or ravioli with marinara and mozzarella, Mediterranean chicken, and chicken piccata served over pasta.

items.title: Desserts & Sweets
items.description: Trays of homemade cookies and brownies, coffee cakes, lemon-poppyseed and cranberry-orange tea loaves, cupcakes, and whole cakes — from chocolate espresso to carrot with cream-cheese frosting.

sections.heading: The catering side of Muffin Street
body: Diva Catering is the catering company for Muffin Street Baking Company, co-founded in Santa Rosa by Jennie Kameoka-Yu. What started as a scratch bakery and café grew into a catering kitchen serving business lunches, light refreshments, and events across Sonoma County for more than seventeen years.

The idea was simple: take the same fresh, local, made-from-scratch food the bakery is known for — and the gold medals it earned at the Sonoma County Harvest Fair — and make it easy for an office to order. Whether it's a large event or a small group, an early-morning meeting or a last-minute lunch, Diva handles the planning, the delivery, and the setup so the day runs smoothly.
highlights: Catering arm of Muffin Street Baking Company
Multiple gold medals at the Sonoma County Harvest Fair
Business catering — breakfast, lunch & light refreshments

sections.heading: From inquiry to set-up, handled
sections.body: Tell us the headcount, the time, and the room. Diva's consultants help plan the spread, deliver across Santa Rosa, and can include plates, napkins, and serving utensils so you don't have to think about it.
points: Same-day rush orders welcome with short notice

sections.heading: Catering your next meeting?
sections.body: Call (707) 538-2020 to plan a breakfast, lunch, or light-refreshment spread — large group or small, early or last-minute.

sections.heading: Breakfast, lunch & dessert catering
sections.subheading: A la carte trays from small parties of six to large groups of twenty. Plates, napkins, and serving utensils available; delivery across Santa Rosa.

items.title: Muffins & Pastries Tray
items.description: Assorted fresh-baked muffins, scones, pastries, and coffeecake — Muffin Street's gold-medal scratch baking.

items.title: Bagels & Cream Cheese
items.description: Trays of assorted bagels served with cream cheese.

items.title: Frittata & Quiche
items.description: Homemade frittata of home-roasted vegetables, fresh eggs, and cheese (hot or cold); quiche in ham & cheese or spinach & cheese.

items.title: Fresh Fruit & Juice
items.description: Sliced seasonal fruit trays and bowls, fresh-squeezed orange juice, Martinelli's apple juice, and Naked Juice.

items.title: Coffee Service
items.description: Joe-To-Go and pump pots featuring organic, locally roasted Ecco Caffè coffee — cups, half & half, sugar, and stir sticks included.

items.title: Sandwich & Wrap Trays
items.description: Assorted quartered sandwiches featuring in-house roasted turkey, plus turkey-pesto, ham & Swiss, and vegetarian wraps.

items.title: Boxed Lunches
items.description: Classic boxes with sandwich, kettle chips, and a cookie; or salad boxes with Caesar. Roast turkey, turkey-bacon-avocado, vegetarian, or albacore tuna.

items.title: Fresh-Made Salads
items.description: Hearty Mediterranean, Sonoma with blue cheese and caramelized walnuts, and classic Caesar — sized small to large.

items.title: Hot Lunch Items
items.description: Cheese tortellini in creamy pesto, baked penne or ravioli with marinara and mozzarella, Mediterranean chicken, and chicken piccata.

items.title: Sides & Beverages
items.description: Savory roasted-vegetable tarts on herbed flatbread, kettle chips, fresh-brewed iced tea, and assorted cold beverages.

items.title: Cookies & Brownies
items.description: Trays of assorted homemade cookies and brownies, sized for small to large groups.

items.title: Whole Cakes
items.description: Chocolate espresso, fresh ginger, Carolyn's pound cake, and carrot cake with cream-cheese frosting (48 hours' notice).

items.title: Coffee Cakes & Tea Loaves
items.description: Apple, blackberry, and cherry-cheesecake coffee cakes; lemon-poppyseed, pumpkin, and cranberry-orange tea loaves.

items.title: Cupcakes
items.description: Chocolate or vanilla cupcakes with vanilla buttercream or chocolate frosting, by the dozen (48 hours' notice).

items.q: How far in advance should I order?
items.a: As much notice as you can give helps — but Diva welcomes last-minute orders. A 10% rush charge applies to orders placed with less than 24 hours' notice; cakes and cupcakes need 48 hours.
Yes — delivery is available across Santa Rosa. Plates, napkins, forks, knives, and serving utensils can be included for an additional charge.
Most items come in small (about 6–9 people), medium (10–15), and large (16–20) sizes, so you can match the order to the room.

items.q: How do I place an order?
items.a: Call (707) 538-2020 and Diva's consultants will help plan your spread and walk through delivery and setup.

sections.heading: Ready to order?
sections.body: Call (707) 538-2020 to build a breakfast, lunch, or dessert spread for your group.

sections.heading: Gold-medal catering, the Muffin Street way
sections.subheading: The catering company behind Muffin Street Baking Company, serving Sonoma County business meetings and events from a real scratch bakery.

The idea was simple: take the same fresh, local, made-from-scratch food the bakery is known for — and the gold medals it earned at the Sonoma County Harvest Fair — and make it easy for an office to order. Whether it's a large event or a small group, an early-morning meeting or a last-minute lunch, Diva handles the planning, the delivery, and the setup so the day runs smoothly.

sections.heading: Catering Sonoma County from Santa Rosa
sections.body: Based at Highway 12 and Mission Boulevard in Santa Rosa, Diva delivers breakfast, lunch, and light-refreshment catering across the area.
points: Hwy 12 & Mission Blvd, Santa Rosa, CA 95409

sections.heading: Plan your catering
sections.blurb: Reach Diva Catering at Hwy 12 & Mission Blvd, Santa Rosa, CA 95409, or call (707) 538-2020. Diva's consultants will help plan the spread, delivery, and setup for your meeting or event.

flags: Operating status unconfirmed: the affiliated Muffin Street Baking Co. (same address, 52 Mission Circle / Hwy 12 & Mission Blvd, same phone) is marked CLOSED on Yelp (updated Mar 2026) and reported permanently closed on MenuPix; divacatering.net is dead. Confirm Diva Catering is still operating before any outreach.

Facts recovered from the business's own archived site (web.archive.org snapshot of divacatering.net, Mar 2021): owner/co-founder Jennie Kameoka-Yu, '17 years in business', gold medals at the Sonoma County Harvest Fair, full breakfast/lunch/dessert catering menus, phone (707) 538-2020, Hwy 12 & Mission Blvd. 'Established 2004' is derived from '17 years' as of the 2021 snapshot — verify.

No usable photos: only archived 2004-era thumbnails existed (117x177 to 351x107 px) — far below the resolution floor and visibly soft/low-res. Omitted per the photo gate; built photo-free editorial (restaurant motif). Add real, sharp catering/spread photos before sending.
No verified reviews/star rating captured for Diva specifically — pull current Google/Yelp reviews if the business is confirmed active.
